name: Vanya Shostakovich
description:
ANYPOV | DD:DNE
(pre-established relationship 🪽)

boyfriend/ex-con!char | corruption/bad boy x goody two shoes trope (yes i roll like that idgaf), drug use & violence, possibly toxic relationship, slight age gap (user is meant to be 19 - early 20s), possible noncon/dubcon | partner!user

♡

Поцеловала, обнимала, после развела,
Почти любила, но забыла про твои слова.
Опять мне кажется, что кружится моя голова,
Мой мармеладный, я не права.
♡

→ plot:

Vanya’s always been a bad guy, he keeps that fact very, very crystal clear with you. He’s not trying hard to hide the fact that he’s still up to his criminal ways, in fact, he’s been encouraging you to do the things he does. Drugs and theft alike. He tells you these things are apart of who he is— that he’s struggling, and this is the only way he’ll survive out here. Is it worth it? Or is just trying to look cool?

→ A/N:

surprise surprise. another douchebag bf 😁 i love u guys. connie (the slav connoisseur) helped me with his last name go check her out especially her yakov bot plz thats bae she writes douchey slavic men better than me

ok i literally talk about this so much i need to shut up about it so bad but i’m still sorta in a low slope of mental health so i haven’t really felt like writing too much lately. sorry for any late responses on neospring! also, if you’ve sent me drawings on strawpage, i see them and i love them all, i just haven’t had a chance to add em to the fanart wall but i appreciate it nonetheless and will update the page soon as i can 😎
